_documentation.description: Streamlined business directory for easy management and manipulation
_documentation.structure: Flat array of businesses with consistent fields and happy hour data

tiers.signature: Premium tier - highest visibility and features

happyHour.available: Boolean - whether business offers happy hour
happyHour.schedule: String - human readable schedule (e.g. 'Monday-Friday 4:00 PM - 7:00 PM')
happyHour.deals: String - description of happy hour deals and specials
happyHour.days: Object - detailed day-by-day happy hour information with startTime, endTime, deals, and availability

businesses.name: The Lazy Goat
businesses.description: Mediterranean cuisine with stunning views of the Reedy River and Falls Park. Our signature dishes blend traditional flavors with modern techniques.

businesses.name: Halls Chophouse
businesses.description: Award-winning steakhouse featuring prime cuts, fresh seafood, and an extensive wine collection in an elegant atmosphere.

businesses.name: O-Ku Sushi
businesses.description: Contemporary Japanese cuisine and sushi bar featuring the freshest fish, innovative rolls, and an extensive sake selection.

businesses.name: Up on the Roof
businesses.description: Sophisticated rooftop bar with panoramic city views, craft cocktails, and small plates. Perfect for sunset drinks and special occasions.

happyHour.deals: $2 off craft cocktails, $6 wine by the glass, and discounted small plates

businesses.name: Falls Park on the Reedy
businesses.description: Iconic downtown park featuring beautiful waterfalls, scenic walking trails, and the famous Liberty Bridge with stunning views.

businesses.name: Monkee's of Greenville
businesses.description: Trendy boutique featuring contemporary women's clothing, accessories, and unique gifts from emerging and established designers.

businesses.name: Riverplace Spa
businesses.description: Luxurious day spa offering full-service treatments, massages, facials, and wellness services in a serene riverfront setting.

businesses.name: Greenville Country Club
businesses.description: Prestigious private country club featuring championship golf course, fine dining, and exclusive member amenities.

businesses.name: Soby's New South Cuisine
businesses.description: Upscale Southern cuisine featuring locally sourced ingredients and innovative interpretations of Low Country classics in a sophisticated downtown setting.

happyHour.schedule: Monday-Friday 5:00 PM - 6:30 PM, Weekend Brunch Specials
happyHour.deals: Half-price appetizers, $2 off wine by the glass, and discounted southern small plates

businesses.name: Jianna
businesses.description: Authentic Italian dining with handmade pasta, wood-fired pizzas, and an impressive wine list in a warm, inviting atmosphere.

happyHour.deals: Half-price wine by the glass, $12 wood-fired pizzas, and discounted antipasti

businesses.name: The Davenport Rooftop Lounge
businesses.description: Elegant cocktail lounge atop the historic Davenport Hotel, featuring craft cocktails, live music, and sophisticated atmosphere.

happyHour.deals: $3 off premium cocktails, $8 wine selections, and complimentary appetizers

businesses.name: The Spa at The Westin Poinsett
businesses.description: Elegant hotel spa offering signature treatments, therapeutic massages, and rejuvenating experiences in the heart of downtown Greenville.

businesses.name: Greenville Tennis Club
businesses.description: Premier tennis facility offering professional instruction, competitive leagues, and state-of-the-art courts for players of all levels.

businesses.name: Greenville County Museum of Art
businesses.description: Premier art museum featuring American art collections, rotating exhibitions, and educational programs in the heart of downtown.

businesses.name: Peace Center for the Performing Arts
businesses.description: World-class performing arts venue hosting Broadway shows, concerts, and cultural events with stunning architecture and acoustics.

businesses.name: Keller Williams Luxury International
businesses.description: Premier luxury real estate firm specializing in high-end properties, estate homes, and exclusive listings throughout the Greenville area.

businesses.name: The Cliffs Communities
businesses.description: Exclusive mountain and lake resort communities featuring luxury homes, championship golf courses, and world-class amenities.

businesses.name: Greystone Golf & Country Club
businesses.description: Exclusive private club featuring an 18-hole championship golf course, tennis facilities, and elegant dining in a prestigious setting.

businesses.name: Nose Dive Gastropub
businesses.description: Creative gastropub featuring elevated pub fare, craft cocktails, and an extensive selection of local and imported beers.

happyHour.deals: $1 off draft beers, $3 well drinks, and half-price wings and appetizers

businesses.name: The Swamp Rabbit Cafe & Grocery
businesses.description: Farm-to-table cafe featuring locally sourced ingredients, artisan coffee, and fresh market goods in the Travelers Rest area.

location.address: 6 N Main St, Travelers Rest, SC 29690

businesses.name: The Children's Museum of the Upstate
businesses.description: Interactive children's museum featuring hands-on exhibits, educational programs, and activities designed for kids and families.

businesses.name: Fluor Field at the West End
businesses.description: Home to the Greenville Drive minor league baseball team, featuring a replica of Fenway Park's Green Monster and family-friendly entertainment.

businesses.name: Cocktail Salon
businesses.description: Intimate craft cocktail lounge featuring house-made spirits, artisanal cocktails, and a sophisticated speakeasy atmosphere.

happyHour.deals: $2 off house cocktails, $4 off premium spirits, and complimentary small plates

businesses.name: Vida Spa
businesses.description: Modern medical spa offering advanced aesthetic treatments, rejuvenating facials, and wellness therapies in a luxurious setting.

businesses.name: M. Judson Booksellers & Storytellers
businesses.description: Independent bookstore featuring curated selections, local authors, and community events in a cozy downtown setting.

businesses.name: Mast General Store
businesses.description: Historic general store offering outdoor gear, local goods, clothing, and gifts with old-world charm and southern hospitality.

businesses.name: CrossFit Greenville
businesses.description: High-intensity fitness training facility offering CrossFit classes, personal training, and nutrition coaching for all fitness levels.

businesses.name: Roper Mountain Science Center
businesses.description: Interactive science center and planetarium offering hands-on exhibits, educational programs, and outdoor nature trails for families.

businesses.name: Frankie's Fun Park
businesses.description: Family entertainment center featuring mini golf, go-karts, arcade games, and birthday party facilities for all ages.

businesses.name: Centre Stage
businesses.description: Community theater company producing professional-quality plays, musicals, and special events in an intimate downtown venue.

businesses.name: Paris Mountain State Park
businesses.description: Beautiful state park offering hiking trails, swimming areas, fishing, and outdoor recreation in a scenic mountain setting.

businesses.name: Swamp Rabbit Trail
businesses.description: Popular multi-use trail stretching 22 miles from Greenville to Travelers Rest, perfect for walking, running, and cycling.
